text.title: React Component Architecture Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the stack React 18+ / Next 13+ with iterative component growth?

branch.question: Is the project using server components (app router)?

conclusion.verdict: mark 'use client' explicitly at file boundary

branch.question: Is Context used for non-global state?

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
